title: Closures, Lexical State, Currying, and Factories · Effects Clinic: Currying Partial
summary: Create configurable validators without mutable module globals or late-binding bugs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp currying partial increment in a closure-based validator factory with capture tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish currying from partial application and choose only when APIs become clearer.
Distinguish deliberate nonlocal state from pure closure configuration and document the effect.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
